[InlineData(new object[] { 0, 0 })]
[InlineData(new object[] { 3, 4 })]
[InlineData(new object[] { -3, 4 })]

Division_Works(float, float, float, float, float, float) 

[Theory]
[InlineData(new object[] { 1, 2, 3, 4, 0.44, 0.08 })]
[InlineData(new object[] { 3, 4, 1, 0, 3, 4 })]
[InlineData(new object[] { 6, 8, 2, 0, 3, 4 })]
[InlineData(new object[] { 3, 4, 0, 1, 4, -3 })]
public void Division_Works(float ar, float ai, float br, float bi, float er, float ei)
